creator: trebestie@gmail.com
text:
If qt33 is installed, qt4-gui's configure process refers to wrong libraries under /usr/local causing build failure.

Fix: 

Waiting for a fix:
deinstall qt33 ('pkg_create -b' is your friend)
install qt4-gui (yes! now it builds)
reinstall qt33
How-To-Repeat: Install qt33 then install qt4-gui.
